summary: Full backend + frontend testing of new features (WelcomeTour, Actualizaciones, Apariencia collapsible sections + search + SavedThemes + NavMenu + UiMode + Tutorial, Ajustes search + collapsible, appearance cloud sync). All 6 backend pytest tests PASS. All 15 frontend UI checks PASS. One stale webpack compile error on AppearancePage.jsx was resolved by touching the file (was showing 'Parsing error: Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <div>' but Babel parses fine — a stale HMR state).

issues: Toggle works functionally (toast 'Chequeo automático desactivado' shown, state changes), but the button does NOT expose aria-checked or data-state attribute. Consider adding aria-checked for accessibility & test automation.

action_items: (Non-blocking) Add aria-checked attribute to auto-check-toggle button for accessibility.

(Non-blocking) A React warning shows Layout.jsx line 22 missing dep 'autoCheckUpdates'; SettingsContext.jsx line 557 has many missing deps; Settings.jsx line 195 missing 'toast'; UpdatesPage.jsx line 83 missing 'load'. These are only warnings, not errors.
critical_code_review_comments: AppearancePage.jsx is 2041 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting sections into separate component files (many are already in /components/appearance/, continue that pattern for remaining inline sections).
SettingsContext.jsx useEffect at line 557 has ~30 missing deps — safer to use useRef or refactor to reduce reactivity scope.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/AppearancePage.jsx (touched to force webpack recompile — no code change)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_Playbook theme via UI + TEST_Theme_Playbook via API. Appearance snapshot cleaned to {} at end. TEST_Cliente_Playbook reservation created + deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features from problem statement verified working end-to-end: (1) Actualizaciones — check-updates-btn shows up-to-date-banner (green animated); auto-check-toggle changes state (only via toast, no aria-checked). (2) Apariencia — 18 collapsible sections found (default collapsed with chevron); search 'fuente' filters to 2 sections; SavedThemes: theme-name-input + save-theme-btn works, TEST_UI_Playbook appeared in saved-themes-list, appearance-sync-badge visible; NavMenu: nav-rename-dashboard 'Inicio' updates sidebar nav-dashboard in real time; UiMode: davinci sets html[data-ui-mode=davinci], classic restores; Tutorial: start-tour-btn + tutorial-enabled-toggle present. (3) Ajustes — settings-search-input filters 6 sections to 1 for 'idioma'. (4) WelcomeTour — appears on clean browser, shows 'Paso 1 de 18', tour-next-btn navigates from /dashboard to /reservaciones by step 5; tour-skip-btn sets localStorage.tour_done=true and doesn't reappear on reload; start-tour-btn from Apariencia manually re-opens tour. (5) Cloud sync — PUT/GET /api/settings/appearance work with updated_at timestamp. (6) Backend endpoints — /api/updates/check returns {checked:true,has_update:false,is_cloud:true,remote_version,id,filename}; /api/themes CRUD works with 400 on missing name. Regression: dashboard stats-grid, reservations list, calendar 'Julio 2026' all render. NOTE: Preview URL https://event-reserve-pro-5.preview.emergentagent.com is UP (contrary to review request note claiming it was down).
rca_of_the_issue: Initial browser load showed a webpack overlay error 'Parsing error: Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <div> at AppearancePage.jsx:1550:6'. Root cause: STALE HMR state — Babel parser and mcp_lint_javascript both parsed the file successfully; touching the file forced webpack to recompile and the error cleared. Main agent should ensure no lingering compile errors are cached in dev server after large edits.
